creator: admin@camille.sh
text:
Hey, it seems the packagesite files for the base_release_0's are not being updated.

Mirror: http://pkg.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:14:amd64/base_release_0/

All packages look like they were bumped to -p6 on 4/8, 
but packagesite.pkg hasn't been updated since 3/28. 

Sample package output: 

pkg install -r base -g "FreeBSD-*"

	 
        FreeBSD-zfs: 14.0p3 [base]
        FreeBSD-zfs-dbg: 14.0p3 [base]
        FreeBSD-zfs-dbg-lib32: 14.0p3 [base]
        FreeBSD-zfs-dev: 14.0p3 [base]
        FreeBSD-zfs-dev-lib32: 14.0p3 [base]
        FreeBSD-zfs-lib32: 14.0p3 [base]
        FreeBSD-zoneinfo: 14.0p5 [base]

Number of packages to be installed: 421

The process will require 4 GiB more space.
1 GiB to be downloaded.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: y
pkg: An error occured while fetching package
